summary:
Betamethasone is known for improving neonatal respiratory function by aiding lung maturation but lacks clear support from research indicating it prevents hyperbilirubinemia among its effects when administered during maternal prematurity management. \(\Box\) C

This summary captures both core aspects—clinical relevance and exception clarity—in two concise statements as requested.
